buttons.optimizationStyle: Optimization style for the next auto-staffing

status.draftTooltip: Schedule not published — click to check compliance and publish
status.lockedTooltip: Past, published week — click to unlock and edit
status.unlockedTooltip: Unlocked for this session — your changes are tracked in the audit log

empty.noServicesConfiguredHint: Set up your service hours (lunch, dinner, etc.) in the targets calendar before building your schedule.

toasts.wipePastAndDelay: This week contains past dates and days within the 8-day modification window (HCR-L3121-47). Employees may refuse these changes.
toasts.wipePast: This week contains past dates. This will affect history.
toasts.wipeDelay: This week contains days within the 8-day modification window (HCR-L3121-47). Employees may refuse these changes.
toasts.weekUnlocked: Week unlocked for this session — your changes will be tracked

autoStaffing.title: Auto-staffing
autoStaffing.existsDescription: An automatic staffing already exists for this week.

unlockWeek.title: Unlock the week
unlockWeek.description: The week of {{from}} to {{to}} is past and published — it is normally locked (payroll record and HCR compliance).
unlockWeek.details: You can unlock it for this session to edit a service. Each change will be tagged [Locked week — override] in the audit log.

wipeWeek.title: Clear the entire week
wipeWeek.description: All services in the week of {{from}} to {{to}} will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.

pastDate.title: Past date
pastDate.description: You are about to edit a service on a past date. This will affect history.

closure.title: Restaurant closed
closure.description: This date falls during a closure period. No staff should be scheduled. Continue?
closure.descriptionWithReason: This date falls during a closure period ({{reason}}). No staff should be scheduled. Continue?

gapWarning.title: Unfilled positions
gapWarning.description: Auto-staffing could not fill all the requested positions. Missing slots are highlighted in red on the schedule.

timeEdit.title: Edit times
timeEdit.note: These times only affect this service for this week. The reference target is not changed.

help.engineExplanation: A constraint-programming optimization technique: each employee × slot assignment is a binary variable (0 or 1). The <link>CP-SAT</link> solver finds the optimal assignment while respecting every legal constraint.
help.priorityIntro: The solver optimizes several weighted objectives, from most important to least important:

items.dragDrop: Drag and drop — drag an employee from the legend onto a day to create a service, or move an existing service between days.
items.objectives: Target profiles — pick a staffing profile to display per-slot targets and unfilled positions.
items.fillTeam: Complete the team — the CP-SAT engine automatically fills empty slots while respecting all constraints.
items.compliance: Compliance — the compliance badge checks HCR rules in real time: max 10h/day, 10h minimum rest, 6 consecutive days max, 46h average over 12 weeks.
items.views: Views — calendar (time grid), list (compact), or stack (grouped by zone).

priorities.fillSlots: Fill slots (weight 1000) — dominant goal: cover every service.
priorities.underHours: Under-contract hours (weight 80/h) — favour employees who haven't yet reached their contractual hours.
priorities.moderateOT: Moderate overtime penalty (weight −40/h) — discourage going beyond 115% of contract.
priorities.lightOT: Light overtime (weight 20/h) — accept light overtime (100-115%) when needed.
priorities.consistency: Schedule consistency (weight 5) — favour employees already assigned to other slots on the same day.
priorities.preferences: Employee preferences (weight 3) — respect availability preferences when possible.
priorities.priority: Employee priority (weight 2) — favour high-priority employees for each slot.
priorities.flexibility: Residual flexibility (weight 1) — preserve capacity to adapt to unexpected changes.

laborCost.title: Payroll
laborCost.tooltip: Payroll — estimate based on hourly rates, scheduled hours, and HCR overtime premiums
laborCost.unpricedNote_one: * {{count}} employee with no rate set (excluded from the total).
laborCost.unpricedNote_other: * {{count}} employees with no rate set (excluded from the total).
laborCost.footnote: Gross estimate with HCR overtime premiums, employer charges not included.

imposedLeave.title: Leave imposed by your employer
imposedLeave.legalNote: Labour Code art. L3141-16 — dates blocked in your schedule.

notPublished.title: Schedule not published
notPublished.body: Your manager hasn't published this week's schedule yet. You'll see it here as soon as it's available.

replacementModal.title: Report unavailability
replacementModal.successBody: Your manager is looking for a replacement. You'll be notified as soon as a solution is found.
replacementModal.ittReminder: Please send your sick-leave certificate as soon as possible. An automatic reminder will be sent if the document is not received in time.
replacementModal.intro: Your manager will be notified and will arrange your replacement. No further action will be required from you after submission.
replacementModal.medicalExplanation: The search for a replacement starts immediately. Your <itt>ITT</itt> (Temporary Work Interruption certificate), issued by your doctor, can be uploaded here or sent directly to your manager once received. An automatic reminder will be sent if not received.

dialog.title: Legal compliance
dialog.description: HCR Collective Agreement check — French Labour Code

panel.subroleSubstitutionBody: These slots are covered by an employee with a different sub-role than the required one. Acceptable but worth monitoring.
panel.noViolationsBody: The schedule complies with the HCR convention
panel.legend: HCR Convention · 39h threshold · 46h avg over 12 weeks · 48h absolute max · 11h rest (10h HCR)
panel.publishWarning_one: ⚠ Publishing now will make this schedule visible to employees despite {{count}} HCR breach.
panel.publishWarning_other: ⚠ Publishing now will make this schedule visible to employees despite {{count}} HCR breaches.
panel.publishedFooter: Employees can currently see this schedule on their app.
panel.unpublishedFooter: Once published, employees will see their schedule and hours.

assignDialog.description: Assign an employee to the {{date}} slot ({{start}}–{{end}}) · {{role}}
assignDialog.descriptionWithSub: Assign an employee to the {{date}} slot ({{start}}–{{end}}) · {{role}} · {{sub}}
